mapper.select: SELECT TEMP2.WEIGH_OUT_DT, TEMP2.WEIGHT_GOODS FROM (SELECT ID, CARGO_INFO_ID FROM T_BUS_HANDOVERLIST UNION SELECT ID, CARGO_INFO_ID FROM T_BUS_HANDOVERLIST_TRANSFER) TBH JOIN T_BUS_CARGO_INFO TBCI ON TBH.CARGO_INFO_ID = TBCI.ID JOIN (SELECT TEMP.CARGO_INFO_ID, VWI.WEIGH_OUT_DT, VWI.WEIGHT_GOODS FROM (SELECT TBTC.BUSINESS_NO, TBTC.CARGO_INFO_ID FROM T_BUS_TRUST_CARGO TBTC JOIN T_BUS_TRUST TBT ON TBTC.TRUST_ID = TBT.ID AND TBT.TYPE IN ('集港', '拆箱集港')) TEMP JOIN V_WEIGHT_INFO VWI ON VWI.IS_OLD = '否' AND TEMP.BUSINESS_NO = VWI.PLAN_NO UNION ALL SELECT TO_NUMBER(VWI2.CARGO_INFO_ID), VWI2.WEIGH_OUT_DT, VWI2.WEIGHT_GOODS FROM V_WEIGHT_INFO VWI2 WHERE VWI2.IS_OLD = '是' AND VWI2.PLAN_TYPE IN ('集港', '拆箱集港')) TEMP2 ON TBCI.ID = TEMP2.CARGO_INFO_ID WHERE TBH.ID = #{handoverlistId,jdbcType=BIGINT}

SELECT TDSI.ID, TDSI.SHIPVOYAGE_ID, TDSI.IMP_EXP, TDSI.TRADE_TYPE, TDSI.LOAD_UNLOAD, TDSI.VOYAGE, TDSI.COMPANY_ID, TDSI.COMPANY_NAME, TDSI.CARGO_CATEGORY_CODE, TDSI.CARGO_CATEGORY_NAME, TDSI.CARGO_NUM, TDSI.CUSTOMER_ID, TDSI.CUSTOMER_NAME, TDSI.CONTACTS, TDSI.SHIP_PHONE, TDSI.PAYMENT_AMOUNT, TDSI.REMARK, TDSI.CREATE_BY, TDSI.CREATE_BY_NAME, TDSI.CREATE_TIME, TDSI.UPDATE_BY, TDSI.UPDATE_BY_NAME, TDSI.UPDATE_TIME, TDSI.SHIP_STATUS_CODE, TDSI.SHIP_STATUS_NAME, TDSI.WORK_START_TIME, TDSI.WORK_END_TIME, TDSI.BO_HAI_TONG_ID, TDSI.PRE_CHANGE_SHIP_NAME, TDSI.PRE_CHANGE_SHIP_NO, TDSI.CUSTOMER_ID_NEW, TDSI.ID, TDSI.SHIPVOYAGE_ID, TDSI.IMP_EXP, TDSI.TRADE_TYPE, TDSI.LOAD_UNLOAD, TDSI.VOYAGE, TDSI.COMPANY_ID, TDSI.COMPANY_NAME, TDSI.CARGO_CATEGORY_CODE, TDSI.CARGO_CATEGORY_NAME, TDSI.CARGO_NUM, TDSI.CUSTOMER_ID, TDSI.CUSTOMER_NAME, TDSI.CONTACTS, TDSI.SHIP_PHONE, TDSI.PAYMENT_AMOUNT, TDSI.REMARK, TDSI.CREATE_BY, TDSI.CREATE_BY_NAME, TDSI.CREATE_TIME, TDSI.UPDATE_BY, TDSI.UPDATE_BY_NAME, TDSI.UPDATE_TIME, TDSI.SHIP_STATUS_CODE, TDSI.SHIP_STATUS_NAME, TDSI.WORK_START_TIME, TDSI.WORK_END_TIME, TDSI.BO_HAI_TONG_ID, TDSI.PRE_CHANGE_SHIP_NAME, TDSI.PRE_CHANGE_SHIP_NO, TDSI.CUSTOMER_ID_NEW FROM (SELECT ID, SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID FROM T_BUS_HANDOVERLIST UNION SELECT ID, SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID FROM T_BUS_HANDOVERLIST_TRANSFER) TBH JOIN T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM TDSI ON TBH.SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID = TDSI.ID WHERE TBH.ID = #{handoverlistId, jdbcType=BIGINT}

SELECT TBH.SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID "shipvoyageItemId", TBH.SHIP_NAME "shipName", TBH.VOYAGE "voyage", SUM(TBH.TON) "ton", TDSI.WORK_END_TIME "workEndTime" FROM (SELECT ID, SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID, SHIP_NAME, VOYAGE, TON, TYPE, LOAD_UNLOAD, CARGO_INFO_ID FROM T_BUS_HANDOVERLIST UNION SELECT ID, SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID, SHIP_NAME, VOYAGE, TON, TYPE, LOAD_UNLOAD, CARGO_INFO_ID FROM T_BUS_HANDOVERLIST_TRANSFER) TBH JOIN T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM TDSI ON TBH.SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID = TDSI.ID WHERE TBH.TYPE = '1' AND TBH.LOAD_UNLOAD = '装' AND TBH.CARGO_INFO_ID = #{cargoInfoId,jdbcType=BIGINT} GROUP BY TBH.SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID, TBH.SHIP_NAME, TBH.VOYAGE, TDSI.WORK_END_TIME ORDER BY TDSI.WORK_END_TIME

SELECT ID, COMPANY_ID, COMPANY_NAME, SHIPVOYAGE_ID, SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID, CARGO_OWNER_ID, CARGO_OWNER_NAME, CARGO_INFO_ID, HANDOVERLIST_ID, CONTRACT_ID, RATE, FREE_STORAGE_DAYS, AMOUNT, START_DATE, END_DATE, STATUS, REVIEW_BY, REVIEW_BY_NAME, REVIEW_BY_TIME, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME, CONTRACT_RATE_ID, TAX, TAX_AMOUNT FROM T_COST_STORAGE_SETTLE WHERE CARGO_INFO_ID = #{cargoInfoId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
